step_rationale: Karyopherin alpha 2; nuclear import protein; connection to atherothrombosis mechanism not established.
mechanism: KPNA2 regulates nuclear translocation of inflammatory transcription factors, potentially modulating monocyte and endothelial inflammatory responses.

references.title: Exploring Potential Drug Targets in Multiple Cardiovascular Diseases: A Study Based on Proteome-Wide Mendelian Randomization and Colocalization Analysis.
